response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems leadership; their background is primarily in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and full-stack web development with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or C++-centric system design.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects and build scalable tools (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ exposure (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year minimum
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems architecture
Lacks documented experience in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or establishing cloud best practices
